row2_auxiliary_summary.ego_motion_trend: Forward movement along a curved road path with slight rightward trajectory.
row2_auxiliary_summary.main_object_trajectory_trend: Red boxes indicate static or slow-moving objects (buildings, poles) and potential dynamic objects; blue lines suggest ego path alignment.

semantic.scene_summary: Urban street scene with multi-lane road, modern buildings on both sides, sidewalks, trees, and bollards. Clear visibility of road markings and infrastructure.
semantic.visibility_notes: All elements are clearly visible with natural lighting and no significant occlusion.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Smooth forward motion consistent with vehicle travel; no abrupt jumps or discontinuities.
logical.object_continuity: Pedestrians and vehicles maintain continuous presence without sudden appearance/disappearance.
logical.structure_continuity: Road geometry and building structures remain stable and coherent across frames.

decision.ego_behavior_description: Ego vehicle continues forward steadily along the road curve.
decision.risk_context: No immediate hazards detected; pedestrian activity is distant and non-interfering.

semantic.scene_summary: Similar urban street layout but with noticeable blurring and loss of detail in textures and edges. Buildings and road features appear less defined.
semantic.visibility_notes: Significant degradation in clarity; many fine details are lost or smeared due to generation artifacts.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Motion appears smooth but exhibits subtle warping and flickering in texture regions, especially around moving objects.
logical.object_continuity: Objects persist but show inconsistent rendering quality — some fade or distort over time.
logical.structure_continuity: Overall structure remains intact but suffers from minor drift and edge instability, particularly near building corners and road boundaries.

decision.ego_behavior_description: Ego vehicle continues forward similarly to Row 1, though visual feedback is degraded.
decision.risk_context: Reduced scene readability may impair downstream perception systems; no explicit risk event visible.

artifacts_or_instabilities: slight geometric drift in static structures
